name: doc-write-release-docs
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>plan>review>handoff>audit |
 scope: diff|repo|paths(glob,...) |
 policy: evidence,quality-gates{docs,compat,release},deterministic-output |
 lens: release-gatekeeper |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: RELEASE_VERSION
required_inputs.description: Version, tag, or release label to name in the docs when known.

required_inputs.name: BREAKING_CHANGE_POLICY
required_inputs.description: How prominently to surface compatibility-impact changes. Defaults to `highlight-all` when omitted.

required_inputs.name: RELEASE_EVIDENCE
required_inputs.description: Diff, tag, issues, PRs, tests, commands, or docs supporting the release claims.
